'''vadate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zigzagwise|zigzagwise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-d-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zigzagwise|zigzagwise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vadate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vadate|vadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vadatesher|vadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadatesherĂ«m|vadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vadatero|vadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vadateshĂ«|vadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadateshĂ«m|vadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivadatero|gokivadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivadateshĂ«|gokivadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadateshĂ«m|gokivadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govadankerom|govadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govadankeshĂ«|govadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govadankeshĂ«m|govadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govadankeya|govadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vadaterom|vadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadatemu|vadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vadateya|vadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivadaterom|gokivadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadatemu|gokivadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivadateya|gokivadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vadadate|vadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vadadatesher|vadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadadatesherĂ«m|vadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vadadatero|vadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vadadateshĂ«|vadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadadateshĂ«m|vadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivadadatero|gokivadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivadadateshĂ«|gokivadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadadateshĂ«m|gokivadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govadadankerom|govadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govadadankeshĂ«|govadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govadadankeshĂ«m|govadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govadadankeya|govadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vadadaterom|vadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadadatemu|vadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vadadateya|vadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivadadaterom|gokivadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadadatemu|gokivadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivadadateya|gokivadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠdĂŠte|vĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠdĂŠtesher|vĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠdĂŠtero|vĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠdĂŠtero|gokivĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠdĂŠnkerom|govĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠdĂŠnkeya|govĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠdĂŠterom|vĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠdĂŠtemu|vĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠdĂŠteya|vĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠdĂŠterom|gokivĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠdĂŠteya|gokivĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafdafte|vafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafdaftesher|vafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafdaftesherĂ«m|vafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafdaftero|vafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafdafteshĂ«|vafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafdafteshĂ«m|vafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafdaftero|gokivafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafdafteshĂ«|gokivafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafdafteshĂ«m|gokivafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafdafnkerom|govafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafdafnkeshĂ«|govafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafdafnkeshĂ«m|govafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafdafnkeya|govafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafdafterom|vafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafdaftemu|vafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafdafteya|vafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafdafterom|gokivafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafdaftemu|gokivafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafdafteya|gokivafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
